title: RTMX Marker Annotation
description: Language-agnostic requirement marker annotation for test functions. Each marker links a test to a requirement in the RTM database.

req_id.description: Requirement identifier matching the RTM database (e.g., REQ-AUTH-001)

test_name.description: Test function or method name (e.g., TestLogin, test_login)

test_file.description: Relative path to the test file (e.g., tests/test_auth.py)

line.description: Source line number where the marker appears
